utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Excuse me , look , we have been here for over an hour , and a lot of people less sick than my friend have gone in .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I mean , that guy with the toe thing ? Who he sleeping with ?

utterances.text: Oh , c mon Dora , do not be mad ...

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I know we both said some things we did not mean , but that does not mean we still do not love each other .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: You know , I feel like I have lost her ... Ba ... !
